free_text: Target residues from the reactions of 9 GeV/c protons
Stacks of Mylar, aluminium, tantalum foils of high
purity were used. Diameter of target discs was 5 mm.
FOIL   MATERIAL   PROTON BEAM   DEUTERON BEAM
The resolution of two detectors (28 cm3 and
45 cm3) was 2.8 keV and 2.3 keV at 1332.9 keV,
Irradiation period was equal to 10**13 total flux
The spectra were analyzed by computer program.
the beam flux monitor was not included into tabulated
